insights: JSONL append-only log implementation with O_APPEND for atomic writes on POSIX/APFS
HistoryEntry struct stores ts (milliseconds), provider name, primary_pct, secondary_pct as optional u8 values
read_history() filters by provider, loads all entries into memory, then drains to keep last N
Silently skips malformed JSON lines without logging errors
Uses dirs::home_dir() for home directory resolution
5 unit tests with tempfile for isolation (roundtrip, missing file, malformed lines, path location, nested dirs)
Added git_root context plumbing through collect_card_groups() → collect_card_views()
Calls acplan::enrich_card_view() when git_root is Some to add plan phase/progress data to CardView
Uses acplan::find_git_root() once per list operation (not per card)
Passes git_root.as_deref() to preserve Option ergonomics through team card paths
Simple pub mod history declaration exports the new history module

patterns_discovered.name: JSONL Append-Only Log
patterns_discovered.description: Immutable event log per line with O_APPEND atomic writes; aligns with bop's storage decision (no SQLite, filesystem-first)
patterns_discovered.usage: Provider metrics snapshots written as one line per observation, filtered by provider name on read

patterns_discovered.name: Context Propagation
patterns_discovered.description: git_root computed once at top level and passed through nested call stack
patterns_discovered.usage: Avoids repeated git root lookups for each card; enables optional enrichment when git context is available

patterns_discovered.name: Graceful Degradation
patterns_discovered.description: read_history() returns empty vec on file-not-found; append_history() creates all parent dirs; no panics
patterns_discovered.usage: First-use workflows don't fail; missing home dir in CI environments handled via Option

patterns_discovered.name: Silent Malformed Data Skipping
patterns_discovered.description: Malformed JSONL lines skipped without error or log message
patterns_discovered.usage: Prevents log corruption from breaking reads, but no visibility into data quality

gotchas_discovered.constraint: POSIX/APFS atomic O_APPEND guarantee is <4096 bytes per write; HistoryEntry JSON likely stays well under, but no validation present
gotchas_discovered.impact: If entry serializes beyond 4KB, write could partially fail undetected

gotchas_discovered.issue: No Tracing for Skipped Malformed Lines
gotchas_discovered.constraint: Malformed JSON lines silently discarded in loop; no error count, warning, or logging
gotchas_discovered.impact: Difficult to detect data corruption or file format issues in production

gotchas_discovered.constraint: Entire file loaded and filtered before limiting to last N entries
gotchas_discovered.impact: For multi-year history files with millions of entries, memory usage scales linearly; no streaming option

gotchas_discovered.constraint: history_path() returns Option; append_history() accepts &Path directly without None handling
gotchas_discovered.impact: If caller bypasses history_path() and passes invalid path, error surfaces only as write failure

gotchas_discovered.constraint: list.rs imports acplan; enrich_card_view() failure is silently ignored (no error propagation)
gotchas_discovered.impact: Plan enrichment can fail silently without informing user; list.rs still displays card without plan data

approach_outcome.summary: Subtask-3-1 completed successfully; history.rs module created with HistoryEntry struct, append/read functions, and comprehensive unit tests. Plan enrichment integrated into list.rs card view collection pipeline.
commits: e514b53 auto-claude: subtask-3-1 - Create providers/history.rs with HistoryEntry struct
bb6201a auto-claude: subtask-3-3 - Wire plan enrichment into collect_card_views()
approach_outcome.test_coverage: 5 unit tests in history.rs covering roundtrip, missing file, malformed line skipping, path location, and nested directory creation; all use tempfile for isolation

recommendations.title: Add Entry Size Validation
recommendations.description: Validate HistoryEntry serializes to <4KB before append; document or enforce in append_history()
recommendations.rationale: Prevents silent truncation if provider names, labels, or error messages grow large

recommendations.title: Stream Large History Files
recommendations.description: Implement read_history_streaming() or take_last_n() iterator to avoid loading entire file into memory
recommendations.rationale: Multi-year history logs could consume significant memory; streaming would degrade gracefully

recommendations.title: Log Skipped Malformed Entries
recommendations.description: Add optional tracing/debug logging in read_history() when JSON deserialization fails
recommendations.rationale: Operator visibility into data corruption without blocking reads; can be enabled in debug builds or via env var

recommendations.title: Document O_APPEND Contract
recommendations.description: Add module-level doc comment clarifying 4KB line limit, APFS atomicity, and implications for max entry size
recommendations.rationale: Future maintainers need to understand storage guarantees when modifying HistoryEntry

recommendations.title: Make Plan Enrichment Error Visible
recommendations.description: In list.rs, log or collect enrichment errors instead of silently ignoring failures
recommendations.rationale: Helps debug missing plan data in card list; currently indistinguishable from cards without AC plans
